◆ Draw On Image
Blend mode
Merge opacity100%
Merge your drawing/engine output onto the image using the selected blend mode. Flatten All merges every layer.
Bake to Canvas
Flatten the image permanently onto the generative canvas. All engines, drawing tools, lighting and atmosphere will then work directly on it.
After baking the image layer is cleared. Use Export to save a copy first.
✦ AI Prompt
Describe changes in plain language. The AI reads the current canvas and all settings, then adjusts engines, palettes, lighting and atmosphere to match.
Enter your Anthropic API key above, then describe what to change.

Temporal colour
▶ --
Certainty is the enemy of emergence. Each mark is a probability cloud.
EXPRESSIONS
1. Dissolution Storm
Maximum of everything — maximum chaos
2. Fracture Field
Heavy fractures, moderate dissolve
3. Phantom Traces
High curve + dissolve, many ghost layers
4. Turbulent Emergence
Balanced, high volatility
5. Crystal Silence
Fracture-dominant, low volatility — brittle precision
6. Pure Probability
All weights equal — true maximum entropy
7. Whisper Field
Soft curves, heavy dissolve, low scatter
8. Shatter Dream
Fracture-heavy with high scatter and volatility
PROBABILITY WEIGHTS
Curve70%
Fracture20%
Dissolve10%
Weights exceed 100% -- normalised
EXPRESSION
Multiplicity3
Volatility40%
Ghost Opacity22%
Scatter24
SEED --
▶ --
Visuals constructed from latent emotional structures — zero derivation from existing artworks.
MEMORY INSCRIPTION
LATENT ARCHITECTURES
1. Waiting, But Hopeful
"A place that felt like waiting but hopeful"
2. Childhood Afternoon
"The texture of a childhood afternoon that never existed"
3. The Colour of Almost
"The colour of a sound you almost remember"
4. Grief as Architecture
"A room where someone used to be"
5. Pre-Language
"A feeling before you had words for it"
6. Inherited Distance
"The longing your grandmother never spoke aloud"
7. Threshold Memory
"The moment between sleeping and knowing where you are"
8. Collective Forgetting
"A place everyone remembers differently"
EMOTIONAL DIMENSIONS
Warmth60%
Weight40%
Temporal Blur70%
Dissolution45%
Texture Depth55%
Spatial Expansion50%
Resonance65%
▶ --
Physics, geometry and mathematics of living form. No images. No corpus. Pure first principles.
SYSTEMS — click to select & render
1. Reaction-Diffusion
Coral polyps, leopard spots, zebra stripes, sea slug patterns, brain folds, vegetation bands, rust stains
2. Phyllotaxis
Sunflower seed heads, pinecone scales, romanesco broccoli, pineapple skin, nautilus chambers, rose petals, agave spirals
3. Vascular Branching
Trees, root systems, blood vessels, lungs, river deltas, lightning bolts, ice crystals, coral skeletons
4. Chladni Resonance
Sand on vibrating plates, acoustic resonance (cymatics), volcanic lava flow patterns, frost crystal geometry
5. Voronoi Cellular
Soap foam, giraffe skin, dragonfly wing veins, basalt columns, bone cross-section, insect compound eyes, leaf cell structure
Gray-Scott: two chemicals diffuse and react (∂A/∂t=Da∇²A−AB²+f(1−A)). Turing, 1952. Generates coral, spots, labyrinths, brain folds.
PARAMETERS
Feed rate f0.037
Kill rate k0.060
Diffusion Da0.20
Diffusion Db0.05
Iterations60
